rounds: Two weeks of the same outfit to work — safe, invisible, no risk taken. That's a loss and you know it. But you're still wearing the Apollo ring every single day, which means a half-naked man rides to work on your finger regardless. They couldn't get that one off you.
pattern: They're letting the small stuff slide but slamming the door the second someone notices.
focus: Next time someone asks about the ring, you say one true sentence.
